stories.headline: Crunchbase H1 2026: Global VC Hits Record $510 Billion as OpenAI and Anthropic Take 43%

sources.name: Crunchbase News — Global Startup Investment Hit Record $510B In H1 2026
Techmeme — Global VC funding hit a record $510B in H1 2026
TechCrunch — After betting the firm on Anthropic, Menlo Ventures raises victorious $3B fund
Bloomberg — Anthropic Backer Menlo Ventures Lands $3 Billion in Its Largest-Ever Haul

stories.key_takeaway: Global venture funding set an all-time half-year record of $510 billion in H1 2026, but nearly half of it flowed to just two frontier AI labs, OpenAI and Anthropic, leaving the market more concentrated than at any point in its history.

pull_quote.text: OpenAI and Anthropic alone accounted for $217 billion — 43% of all startup funding in H1 — underscoring how a small handful of frontier AI companies is reshaping venture markets.

data_points.label: Q2 capital going to AI companies

stories.article_excerpt: Global venture funding hit a record $510 billion in the first half of 2026 — but two AI labs took 43% of it.

stories.headline: Palantir's Alex Karp Calls Frontier AI a 'Wealth Tax' on Business

sources.name: Forbes — Karp Says Frontier AI Labs Are Stealing Enterprise Value And VCs Are Listening
Forbes — Palantir Billionaire Alex Karp Calls AI Industry 'Effing Insane' In Heated Interview
CNBC — OpenAI and Anthropic face new AI reality as users shift from 'tokenmaxxing' to efficiency

stories.key_takeaway: Palantir CEO Alex Karp is casting frontier-lab AI pricing as a value-extracting 'wealth tax' on enterprises and pitching Palantir's platform plus Nvidia's open Nemotron models as the cheaper, sovereign alternative.

pull_quote.text: I'm going to chillax and waste my time with tokens, I'm going to get no value, and they're going to get my IP.

data_points.label: Claude Sonnet 5 introductory per M output tokens
Palantir stock jump after the interview

stories.article_excerpt: Alex Karp walked onto CNBC and said out loud what enterprise buyers have been muttering in private: the frontier AI ind

stories.headline: Chip-Design Startup Oxmiq Raises $35 Million to Challenge Nvidia's GPU Dominance

sources.name: OXMIQ Raises $35 Million to Scale OxCore Architecture (Business Wire)
Raja Koduri's Oxmiq Labs raises $35M to lower the design cost of custom AI silicon (SiliconANGLE)
Oxmiq Secures $35M, Targets Data Center Design (EE Times)
Venture Capital Startup Funding Roundup, July 1, 2026 (TechStartups)

stories.key_takeaway: Raja Koduri's Oxmiq Labs raised a $35 million Series A to license an open, CUDA-compatible GPU architecture, betting an Arm-style IP model can lower the cost of custom AI silicon and chip away at Nvidia's grip on AI compute.

pull_quote.text: A licensable core with an open architecture means design teams everywhere can build the custom AI silicon their work needs.

data_points.label: GPU, tensor and CPU engines in OxCore

stories.article_excerpt: The wave of AI money flowing into infrastructure in July 2026 found one of its most pointed targets in a Campbell, Calif.

stories.headline: IQVIA Launches IQVIA.ai With 150+ Specialized Agents to Automate Clinical Trials

sources.name: IQVIA Newsroom — IQVIA Unveils IQVIA.ai
IQVIA.ai Platform
NVIDIA Blog — IQVIA and NVIDIA Accelerate Clinical Research With AI Agents
Business Wire — IQVIA Unveils IQVIA.ai
Drug Discovery Trends — Salesforce lands 140 life sciences clients

stories.key_takeaway: IQVIA has folded 150-plus specialized AI agents into a single agentic platform, IQVIA.ai, aiming to compress the slowest, most manual stages of clinical trials and pharma commercialization and to stake its claim in a fast-crowding healthcare AI race.

pull_quote.text: By bringing together our data, expertise and Healthcare-grade AI within a unified, agentic platform, IQVIA.ai enables organizations to move faster and smarter while meeting the rigorous standards of trust and reliability that are required in the industry.
pull_quote.role: Senior Vice President, AI and Technology Solutions, IQVIA

data_points.label: Top pharma companies using IQVIA agents
Clinical data review time cut by one agent

stories.article_excerpt: The company that has long sat on the pharmaceutical industry's data now wants to sit on its workflows too.

stories.headline: Queue Raises $12.6 Million to Deploy Fully Autonomous Pharmacy Robots

sources.name: The Robot Report
SiliconANGLE
BusinessWire
Tech Startups

stories.key_takeaway: Queue emerged from stealth with a $12.6 million seed round led by AlleyCorp to deploy robotic kiosks that fill and verify prescriptions without an on-site pharmacist, betting automation can relieve a deepening pharmacy labor crisis.

pull_quote.text: Pharmacy in America is structurally broken. Queue isn't an incremental fix; it's a complete reimagining of how medications get dispensed, verified and delivered.

data_points.label: Claimed cost reduction vs. traditional pharmacy

stories.article_excerpt: A Silicon Valley startup that wants to take the pharmacist out of the pharmacy has stepped out of stealth with fresh cash

stories.headline: Grok 4.5 Enters Private Beta at SpaceX and Tesla With a 1.5-Trillion-Parameter V9 Foundation

sources.name: Crypto Briefing
Tech Times
TradingKey
Let's Data Science

stories.key_takeaway: xAI has quietly moved Grok 4.5 and its 1.5-trillion-parameter V9 foundation into private beta inside SpaceX and Tesla, but its headline claim of near-Opus performance rests entirely on internal evals with no independent benchmark to check it against.

pull_quote.text: Grok 4.5 is now in private beta at SpaceX and Tesla. Early internal evals show performance close to, perhaps exceeding, Opus.

stories.article_excerpt: Elon Musk says Grok 4.5, built on xAI's new 1.5-trillion-parameter V9 foundation, has entered private beta inside SpaceX and

stories.headline: Meta's 'Watermelon' Model Matches GPT-5.5 on an Order of Magnitude More Compute

sources.name: Benzinga
American Bazaar
SemiAnalysis

stories.key_takeaway: Meta's chief AI officer told staff its in-training 'Watermelon' model has caught up to GPT-5.5 using an order of magnitude more compute, but the claim rests on an internal town hall with no disclosed benchmarks or public model.

data_points.label: more compute than Meta's prior frontier model

stories.article_excerpt: Meta's chief AI officer told employees its next model has caught up to GPT-5.5. There are no public benchmarks.

stories.headline: The Anonymous 'Owl Alpha' That Topped OpenRouter Was Meituan's LongCat-2.0 All Along

sources.name: VentureBeat — Meituan open sources LongCat-2.0
Decrypt — LongCat-2.0: The Stealth AI Model That Was Quietly Topping OpenRouter
Meituan LongCat-2.0 on Hugging Face

stories.key_takeaway: For weeks, developers ranked a Chinese company's model the most-used coding LLM on OpenRouter without knowing its origin — proving that when attribution is stripped away, model adoption follows merit, not geopolitics.

pull_quote.text: Owl Alpha on OpenRouter — that's us.

stories.article_excerpt: For roughly two months, the fastest-rising coding model on OpenRouter had no company name attached to it. Develop

stories.headline: NVIDIA Ships New Physical AI Foundation Models as Partners Unveil Next-Generation Robots

sources.name: NVIDIA Newsroom — NVIDIA Releases New Physical AI Models as Global Partners Unveil Next-Generation Robots
NVIDIA Blog — National Robotics Week: Latest Physical AI Research and Breakthroughs
Google DeepMind — Gemini Robotics
The Register — Boston Dynamics beats Tesla to the humanoid robot punch

stories.key_takeaway: NVIDIA released a new tier of open physical-AI foundation models — Cosmos world models, Cosmos Reason 2 and Isaac GR00T N1.6 — plus simulation and orchestration tooling, positioning itself as the pretrained substrate for a wave of partner robots and intensifying the embodied-AI race with Google DeepMind, Tesla and Figure.

pull_quote.text: The ChatGPT moment for robotics is here. Breakthroughs in physical AI — models that understand the real world, reason and plan actions — are unlocking entirely new applications.

data_points.label: NVIDIA robotics developers united with Hugging Face's AI builders via LeRobot
Price of the new Blackwell-based Jetson T4000 robotics module (1,000-unit volume)

Global partners debuting new robots on the stack, from Boston Dynamics to LG and NEURA

stories.article_excerpt: NVIDIA has released a new tier of open foundation models for physical AI, betting that the hardest part of build

stories.headline: Proteina-Complexa: NVIDIA's Protein-Binder Model Validated Across 130+ Targets at Million-Design Scale

sources.name: Designing Protein Binders Using the Generative Model Proteina-Complexa — NVIDIA Technical Blog
Manifold Bio Demonstrates Million-Scale Experimental Validation of AI-Driven Protein Binder Design with NVIDIA
Proteina-Complexa — NVIDIA Research (GenAIR)
Scaling Atomistic Protein Binder Design with Generative Pretraining and Test-Time Compute — OpenReview

stories.key_takeaway: NVIDIA's Proteina-Complexa co-designs fully atomistic protein binders and, in a collaboration with Manifold Bio, saw roughly a million designs tested against 130-plus targets, hitting a majority of them and reaching picomolar affinities.

pull_quote.text: With test-time scaling, we've enabled the model to refine its logic before outputting a single sequence.

stories.article_excerpt: For years, the promise of designing a drug-like protein from scratch has run ahead of the evidence. A new model from NVIDIA

stories.headline: Anthropic Moves to Close the Loopholes Chinese Firms Use to Access Claude

sources.name: Investing.com — Anthropic targets loopholes used by Chinese firms to access Claude, FT reports
BanklessTimes — Anthropic Moves to Block Chinese Firms Using Claude via Offshore Workarounds
ZeroHedge — Anthropic Moves To Shut Loopholes Letting Chinese Tech Firms Access Claude
Anthropic — Updating restrictions of sales to unsupported regions

stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic is escalating detection and enforcement to shut down the offshore subsidiaries, VPN reimbursement schemes and cloud proxies Chinese firms use to reach Claude in ways that break its terms without breaking any law.

data_points.label: fraudulent accounts in the distillation campaign Anthropic tied to Alibaba's Qwen lab
Claude interactions generated between April 22 and June 5, 2026
ownership threshold that puts a foreign entity under an unsupported region's control
date of the Financial Times report on the loophole crackdown

stories.article_excerpt: Anthropic is done treating Chinese access to Claude as someone else's enforcement problem. The company is now hunting the workarounds.

stories.headline: Pentagon Emails Reveal the Real Fight: Autonomous Weapons and Mass Surveillance

sources.name: The Next Web — The emails that broke Anthropic and the Pentagon apart
Gizmodo — Read the Tense Emails Between the Pentagon and Anthropic
CBS News — Dario Amodei on the red lines Anthropic would not cross
The Wall Street Journal — Read the Emails Revealing How Anthropic's Pentagon Relationship Fell Apart

stories.key_takeaway: Court-released emails show the Anthropic-Pentagon rift was never about access to Claude but about whether an AI lab can bar a government customer from two uses: fully autonomous weapons and domestic mass surveillance.

pull_quote.text: There is no distinction in our world between weapons that are defensive or offensive.
pull_quote.role: Pentagon Undersecretary of Defense for Research and Engineering

stories.article_excerpt: For months, the standoff between Anthropic and the Pentagon looked like a contract fight over access to Claude. Court d

stories.headline: Anthropic Launches a HackerOne Bug Bounty for Fable 5 Cyber Jailbreaks

sources.name: Anthropic — Redeploying Claude Fable 5
The Hacker News — Anthropic Restores Claude Fable 5 After U.S. Lifts Jailbreak-Linked Export Controls
HackerOne — Anthropic Cyber Jailbreak program

stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic has opened a HackerOne channel dedicated to cyber jailbreaks in Claude Fable 5, formalizing a research pipeline the June export-control episode showed was missing.

pull_quote.text: We're also launching a new HackerOne program where security researchers can submit potential cyber jailbreaks they've discovered in Fable 5 (once available) for our review.

stories.article_excerpt: When the US government yanked Claude Fable 5 offline in June, the jailbreak that triggered it had not come through any

stories.headline: Inside the Draft Framework for Scoring AI Jailbreak Severity

sources.name: Anthropic — More details on Fable 5's cyber safeguards and our jailbreak framework
Anthropic — Redeploying Fable 5
AI Weekly — Anthropic Redeploys Fable 5 With Cross-Lab Jailbreak Rubric

stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic and its cloud partners are drafting a shared, four-axis severity scale for AI jailbreaks that, applied to the June 12 export-control episode, would have graded the triggering incident far below the crisis level it was treated as.

pull_quote.text: Our hope is that this collaboration, along with our proposed consensus industry framework, will serve as the basis for systematic rules for the whole industry.
